name: Recruiter: Advanced BOOLEAN search → candidates (parameterized)
description: LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-09 (run 602c34fb): parameterized BOOLEAN search via the Recruiter ADVANCED search keyword facet. The keyword field is a <textarea data-test-free-text-single-value-facet-textarea> (placeholder 'Introducir palabras clave…'), NOT an input, and it COMMITS ON ENTER — blur DISCARDS the value, the Search button alone races/discards, and there is no apply button. So: reveal facet → type {{boolean_query}} + Enter (\n) to commit → click Search → extract (recruiter_search_people; daemon returns total_count + paginates). Selectors are Spanish/locale-independent. KNOWN: keywords-only is GLOBAL (millions) — location + skills facets are required to focus to ~15 (see CLAUDE.md). Param: boolean_query (backend create_run substitutes runtime_params).

selector_chain.value: button[aria-label="Añadir Palabras clave del perfil u operadores booleanos"]
Añadir Palabras clave del perfil u operadores booleanos

steps.intent: Boolean keyword query + Enter to commit the facet
